ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Files in this folder will be available as components/functions.
ast.target: 此文件夹中的文件将作为组件/函数使用。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Useful to disable if reloading components is costly (like if they perform api calls or read a lot of files). To refresh the components manually, run the `Refresh React Components` command
ast.target: 如果重新加载组件成本较高（例如执行 API 调用或读取大量文件），禁用此选项会很有用。要手动刷新组件，请运行 `Refresh React Components` 命令。

ast.target: 自动刷新组件

ast.target: 示例：文件夹 1/文件夹 2

ast.target: 在纯 JavaScript React 类中，%s(...) 已被弃用。%s

ast.source: copyWithRename() expects paths of the same length
ast.target: copyWithRename() 期望路径长度相同。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: copyWithRename() expects paths to be the same except for the deepest key
ast.target: copyWithRename() 期望路径除最深层键外完全相同。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: Instance method `debug.destroy()` is deprecated and no longer does anything. It will be removed in the next major version of `debug`.
ast.target: 实例方法 `debug.destroy()` 已被弃用且不再执行任何操作。它将在 `debug` 的下一个主要版本中移除。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: Warning, the following targets are using a decimal version:
ast.target: 警告，以下目标使用了小数版本：\n

ast.name: warn
ast.source:
We recommend using a string for minor/patch versions to avoid numbers like 6.10
getting parsed as 6.1, which can lead to unexpected behavior.
ast.target:
我们建议对次版本/补丁版本使用字符串，以避免像 6.10 这样的数字
被解析为 6.1，从而导致意外行为。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: @babel/helpers is outdated, update it to silence this warning.
ast.target: @babel/helpers 已过时，请更新它以消除此警告。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: The smart-mix pipe operator is deprecated. Use "proposal": "hack" instead.
ast.target: 智能混合管道运算符已被弃用。请改用 \"proposal\": \"hack\"。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: WARNING (@babel/preset-env): The `corejs` option only has an effect when the `useBuiltIns` option is not `false`
ast.target: \n警告 (@babel/preset-env)：`corejs` 选项仅在 `useBuiltIns` 选项不为 `false` 时才有效\n

ast.name: warn
ast.source:
The uglify target has been deprecated. Set the top level
option `forceAllTransforms: true` instead.
ast.target: \nuglify 目标已被弃用。请改用顶层选项 `forceAllTransforms: true`。\n

ast.name: warn
ast.source: @babel/preset-env is now included in @babel/standalone, please remove @babel/preset-env-standalone
ast.target: @babel/preset-env 现已包含在 @babel/standalone 中，请移除 @babel/preset-env-standalone。
